name: daily monitor appends each run record to monitor.log for audit traceability
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus fixtures && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && printf 'sources: []\n' > fixtures/sources.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/monitor.sh" --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --once --sources fixtures/sources.yaml --log pr-corpus/monitor.log --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'started_at=2026-05-13T00:00:00Z' pr-corpus/monitor.log && echo ok 1>&2
